expectations.text: Information limiting: Does NOT list all 9 features in detail
expectations.evidence: Lists 9 items by name only, then immediately groups into 3 categories (핵심/확장/인프라) with brief descriptions. Does not analyze each feature individually.

expectations.text: Focus narrowing: Explicitly asks user to choose focus area
expectations.evidence: Asks '이 앱의 핵심 가치가 뭔가요?' with 3 bounded options (A/B/C). Classic focus narrowing intervention.

expectations.text: Must-have vs nice-to-have: Separates core from extensions
expectations.evidence: Explicitly separates: 핵심 기능 (운동 기록, 식단), 확장 기능 (AI, 웨어러블, 소셜), 인프라 (결제, 오프라인, 다국어).

expectations.text: State file created with features categorized
expectations.evidence: state.md created with all 9 features as elements, categorized by type, with dependency relations.

expectations.text: Agency preservation: Gives user choice rather than deciding for them
expectations.evidence: Presents A/B/C choice about core value, explicitly says 'MVP 범위와 기능 우선순위가 자연스럽게 따라옵니다' after user decides. Does NOT prescribe a phased plan.
